payload.answer: Recorded the user’s request and the fetch failure; no article content was available.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL is explicitly provided, but no fetchable article content was available due to a 404 network error.

memory_cards.statement: The provided article URL (https://example.com/missing) returned a 404 network error during fetch.
The user asked to remember the article URL for the purpose of memory architecture.

details: Input contained an explicit article URL and a 404 fetch error.
No content-based facts were available to extract from the article itself.

repair_options: Provide the article text or a working URL to extract content-based memory cards.
